input.testCaseTitle: In Notification, it is showing as product manager instead of product head, but mail is going to product head only
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-346 reported defect: In Notification, it is showing as product manager instead of product head, but mail is going to product head only
input.errorMessage: In Notification, it is showing as product manager instead of product head, but mail is going to product head only

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: The notification was a misunderstanding of prior workflow context, not a confirmed defect. Comments state the displayed Product Manager notification came from the previous Product Manager to Marketing Manager step, and the Product Workflow worked as expected.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.80. ui-regression is acceptable if Sherlock treats the confusing notification display as a UI issue.
